title: taraxacum plicatiangulatum
intro: Taraxacum plicatiangulatum, also known as a type of dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Taraxacum plicatiangulatum include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, as well as potentially lowering blood sugar levels and improving liver function. Taraxacum plicatiangulatum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
